versions.version_description: Transposed to D for ease of playing in standard tuning, more accurate chords and structure.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:

"Shut Up and Dance"

Capo 6


[Intro Tab]

B|-----3--------3--------3-----3--------3--------3--|
G|--4--------5--------5-----4--------2--------2-----|
D|--------------------------------------------------|
A|--------------------------------------------------|
E|--------------------------------------------------|[/tab]
